get.summary: Get user object by username (one request required). If speed is crucial, it's more efficient to use the by/id endpoint for quicker responses.
get.description: Get user object by username. Returns a User object.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_by_username_v1(username="sun")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Get user object by id. Returns a User object.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_by_id_v1(id="123123")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Get user object by id. Returns user about info.
Get part of user medias with cursor. Returns a list of Media objects.

schema.title: Response User Medias Chunk V1 User Medias Chunk Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
medias, end_cursor = await cl.user_medias_chunk_v1(
    user_id="123123", end_cursor=None
)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description:
Get part of user clips with cursor 

The response includes trial publications
https://help.instagram.com/1013292530224018 

Trial publications have no "reshare_count" field if you need to filter them. Returns a list of Media objects (Reels).

schema.title: Response User Clips Chunk V1 User Clips Chunk Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
medias, end_cursor = await cl.user_clips_chunk_v1(user_id="123123", end_cursor=None)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: Get user object by URL (one request required)
get.description: Get user object by URL. Returns a User object.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_by_url_v1(url="https://www.ins...ram.com/thesun")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Search users by following users. Returns matching User objects.

schema.title: Response Search Following V1 User Search Following Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_search_following_v1(user_id="123123", query="sun")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Search users by followers. Returns matching User objects.

schema.title: Response Search Followers V1 User Search Followers Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_search_followers_v1(user_id="123123", query="sun")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: Get a user following (one request required)
get.description: Get part (one page) of following users with cursor. Returns a list of User objects.

schema.title: Response User Following Chunk V1 User Following Chunk Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
followings, max_id = await cl.user_following_chunk_v1(
    user_id="123123", max_id=None
)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: Get a user followers (one request required)
get.description: Get part (one page) of followers users with cursor. Returns a list of User objects.

schema.title: Response User Followers Chunk V1 User Followers Chunk Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
followers, max_id = await cl.user_followers_chunk_v1(
    user_id="123123", max_id=None
)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Get user medias. Returns a list of Media objects.

schema.title: Response User Pinned Medias V1 User Medias Pinned Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_medias_pinned_v1(user_id="123123", amount=10)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Get usertag medias

schema.title: Response Usertag Medias Chunk V1 User Tag Medias Chunk Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
medias, max_id = await cl.user_tag_medias_chunk_v1(user_id="123123", max_id=None)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: WARNING: Deprecated. Instagram returns ~90% false UserNotFound since Feb 2, 2026. Use /gql/user/web_profile_info instead (accepts numeric user ID, much more reliable).

schema.title: Response Web Profile Info V1 User Web Profile Info Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_web_profile_info_v1(username="sun")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: WARNING: Use v1/user/clips/chunk. Get user clips - first page
get.description: Get user clips. Returns a list of Media objects (Reels).

schema.title: Response User Clips V1 User Clips Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_clips_v1(user_id="123123", amount=10)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: WARNING: Use /v2/user/followers of /v1/user/followers/chunk. Get first page user followers
get.description: Get followers users. Returns a list of User objects.

schema.title: Response User Followers V1 User Followers Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_followers_v1(user_id="123123", amount=10)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: WARNING: Use /v2/user/following or /v1/user/following/chunk. Get first page user following
get.description: Get following users. Returns a list of User objects.

schema.title: Response User Following V1 User Following Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_following_v1(user_id="123123", amount=10)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

x-codeSamples.source:

res = await cl.user_guides_v1(user_id="123123")

get.summary: WARNING: Use /v2/user/medias (better) or /v1/user/medias/chunk. Get user medias - first page

x-codeSamples.source:

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_medias_v1(user_id="123123", amount=10)

schema.title: Response Usertag Medias V1 User Tag Medias Get
